title: rubus villicaulis subsp. obotriticus
intro: Rubus villicaulis subsp. obotriticus, also known as the Obotritic raspberry or raspberry species, is a type of plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. It is a species of raspberry that is native to Europe and Asia, known for its medicinal properties, including its astringent and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant's health benefits include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as dried leaves, roots, or berries, and is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
